# NH 44 Indian

> Indian restaurant in Hartsdale, Westchester County, NY — kebabs, curries, biryani, and street food inspired by India's National Highway 44.

NH 44 Indian is a dine-in Indian restaurant at 219 E. Hartsdale Ave, Hartsdale, NY 10530. The menu spans north-to-south Indian cuisine: tandoor kebabs, curries, biryanis, vegetarian and vegan dishes, and catering for events.

## Key facts

- **Name:** NH 44 Indian
- **Cuisine:** Indian (North and South Indian, street food, tandoor)
- **Location:** 219 E. Hartsdale Ave, Hartsdale, NY 10530
- **Phone:** (914) 574-5262
- **Email:** info@nh44indian.com
- **Hours:** Sun–Thu 12:00pm–9:30pm; Fri–Sat 12:00pm–10pm
- **Services:** Dine-in, takeout, delivery, reservations, catering

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.nh44indian.com/): Overview, signatures, reviews, FAQ
- [Menu](https://www.nh44indian.com/menu): Full dining menu — tandoor, curries, biryani, breads, sweets
- [About](https://www.nh44indian.com/about): Restaurant story and highway theme
- [Gallery](https://www.nh44indian.com/gallery): Interior murals and dishes
- [Contact](https://www.nh44indian.com/contact): Phone, email, map, contact form
- [Catering](https://www.nh44indian.com/reserve): Catering requests for events and parties
